description_long: This is a robust wooden storage box with a square shape and reinforced corners, featuring a distinctive 'X' cross-brace design on each side. The wood appears weathered and slightly stained, suggesting it has been used outdoors or in rugged environments. The box is open at the top, with thick planks forming the sides and base, and visible wood grain and knots throughout. There are no visible handles, locks, or labeling areas, giving it a utilitarian and rustic appearance. The construction is solid, likely intended to store or transport heavy or bulky items. Its design is reminiscent of traditional shipping crates often seen in urban alleys, garages, or storage yards.
description: A sturdy, weathered wooden storage box with an open top and 'X' cross-brace design on each side, built for durability and utility.
description_view_0: Front view shows the 'X' cross-brace and wood grain details, with no handles or locks visible.
description_view_1: Side view is nearly identical to the front, with subtle differences in wood texture and minor stains.
description_view_2: Another side view, showing the same 'X' pattern and wood planks, with slightly less visible staining.
description_view_3: Back view mirrors the front, with more pronounced weathering and dark stains on the wood surface.
